200.description: Returns a welcome message indicating the API is running

get.description: Generates and returns a CSRF token that must be included in all state-changing requests (POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE). The token should be sent in the X-CSRF-Token header.

csrfToken.description: The CSRF token to use in subsequent requests

200.description: List of all users retrieved successfully
Returns the current onboarding status for the user

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

400.description: Invalid password format or validation failed

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

post.description: Upgrades session from ONBOARDING to CLOUD and rotates tokens. Call this when the user clicks Go to Dashboard.

200.description: Verification code sent to your email

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token
Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

post.description: Updates the user email and sends a new OTP to it.

200.description: Email updated and new OTP sent.

409.description: Email already in use

post.description: Sends an OTP via SMS to the provided phone number for manual entry. Use the SSE endpoints for QR-based WhatsApp or SMS verification.

400.description: Invalid phone number or verification method

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

get.description:
SSE endpoint that initiates WhatsApp verification and immediately streams status updates.
The first event is type "initiated" containing the verification code and WhatsApp number.
Subsequent events are pushed when the user sends the code via WhatsApp.

200.description: SSE stream established. First event is "initiated", followed by status updates.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

get.summary: Initiate WhatsApp QR verification and subscribe to events

get.description:
SSE endpoint that initiates SMS QR verification and immediately streams status updates.
The first event is type "initiated" containing the verification code to send via SMS.
Subsequent events are pushed when the user sends the code via SMS.

200.description: SSE stream established. First event is "initiated", followed by status updates.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

get.summary: Initiate SMS QR verification and subscribe to events

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

post.summary: Verify mobile phone number using OTP

get.description:
Handles webhook subscription verification from Meta (WhatsApp) and Twilio (SMS).

    For WhatsApp: Returns hub.challenge if hub.verify_token matches.
    For SMS: Returns challenge if verify_token matches.

parameters.name: hub.challenge
parameters.description: WhatsApp: Challenge string to echo back

parameters.name: challenge
parameters.description: SMS/Twilio: Challenge string to echo back

200.description: Webhook verified successfully, returns the challenge string

post.description:
Receives and processes incoming message webhooks from Meta (WhatsApp) and Twilio (SMS).

    Validates webhook signatures before processing:
    - WhatsApp: Uses X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC-SHA256)
    - SMS: Uses X-Twilio-Signature header (HMAC-SHA1)

    Messages containing verification tokens are processed to complete mobile verification.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload from provider (WhatsApp or Twilio format)

200.description: Webhook received and queued for processing

post.summary: Handle incoming webhook events from WhatsApp or SMS providers

200.description: Returns QR code and manual key for TOTP setup

400.description: MFA already enabled for this user

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

200.description: TOTP verified successfully, returns backup codes

400.description: Invalid TOTP code or session expired

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

post.summary: Verify TOTP setup with a code from authenticator app

200.description: Returns WebAuthn registration options for passkey setup

400.description: MFA already enabled for this user

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

200.description: Passkey registered successfully, returns backup codes

400.description: Invalid passkey credential or session expired

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token
Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

200.description: Returns the current MFA configuration status

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing onboarding token

post.description: Creates a new user account and initiates the onboarding flow. Returns an access token and sets a refresh token in an httpOnly cookie.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation error.

409.description: User with this email already exists.

post.description: Authenticates the user with email and password. Returns an access token and sets a refresh token in an httpOnly cookie.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation error.

get.description: Checks authentication status via httpOnly cookie. Returns user data and access token if authenticated, or { isAuthenticated: false } if not. Never returns 401.
Recovers the session by reading the refresh token from the httpOnly cookie and returns a new access token. Does not rotate the refresh token.

post.description: Generates a new access token and rotates the refresh token for enhanced security.
Invalidates the current session and clears the refresh token cookie.
Invalidates all active sessions for the current user across all devices.

201.description: Successfully logged out from all devices.

get.description: Get all active sessions for the authenticated user across all devices.

delete.description: Invalidate a specific session by ID. Cannot revoke the current session.

post.description: Change the authenticated user's password. Requires current password verification.

400.description: Invalid current password or validation error.

post.description: Sends a password reset OTP to the provided email and creates a RESET session. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: Password reset email sent (if account exists).

post.description: Resends the password reset OTP to the user email. Requires an active RESET session.
Validates the OTP using the authenticated RESET session.

400.description: No reset request found or OTP expired.

post.description: Resets password, invalidates all sessions, creates a new session.

400.description: OTP not verified or reset window expired.

get.description: Initiates the OAuth authentication flow by redirecting the user to the specified OAuth provider's authorization page.

302.description: Redirects to OAuth provider authorization page.

get.description: Receives the authorization code from the OAuth provider after user authorization. Exchanges the code for tokens and creates a session.

302.description: Redirects to frontend with refresh cookie on success, or to error page on failure.

post.description: Initiates the WebAuthn authentication flow by generating a challenge and authentication options. Optionally accepts an email to limit to the user's registered passkeys.

sessionId.description: Session ID for the authentication flow

400.description: Invalid request or no passkeys registered for the provided email.

404.description: User not found for the provided email.

post.description: Verifies the WebAuthn authentication response and creates a user session. Returns an access token and sets a refresh token in an httpOnly cookie.

200.description: Authentication successful. Returns access token and user information.

401.description: Authentication failed. Invalid or expired challenge.

404.description: Session not found or passkey not registered.

400.description: Invalid TOTP code or malformed request
Invalid request or phone number not configured

post.summary: Send SMS OTP for MFA verification

400.description: Invalid OTP code or malformed request

post.summary: Verify SMS OTP code for MFA

400.description: Invalid request or no passkeys registered
Invalid passkey credential or malformed request

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile information.

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information including name, phone, profile picture, locale, and timezone.

delete.description: Soft delete the authenticated user's account. Sets account status to INACTIVE and invalidates all sessions.

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the current email or phone to verify user identity before allowing a contact change.

400.description: Contact not verified or other validation error

post.summary: Start identity verification for contact change

post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the current email or phone to confirm user identity.
Validates the new email or phone, checks if already in use, and sends a verification OTP to the new target.

400.description: Target already in use or identity not verified

post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the new email or phone and updates the user contact information.
post.summary: Verify new target OTP and complete change

post.description: Resends the verification OTP to the active target (email or phone).

400.description: Invalid file type, file too large, or no file provided.

info.title: Vritti Cloud API
info.description: Internal API for Vritti SaaS Platform

hasPassword.description: Whether user has set a password

password.description: User password that must be at least 8 characters and contain at least one lowercase letter, uppercase letter, number, and special character

success.description: Indicates whether the onboarding start request was successful

message.description: Human-readable message describing the result of the operation
message.example: Onboarding started successfully. OTP sent to your email.

success.description: Indicates whether the OTP was resent successfully

otp.description: Six-digit one-time password sent to the user email address for verification

success.description: Indicates whether the email was verified successfully

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format (with + prefix).

phoneCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the phone number

method.description: Method to use for mobile verification.

success.description: Indicates whether the verification was initiated successfully

message.description: Human-readable message describing the verification status

verificationCode.description: Verification code for QR-based methods (WhatsApp/SMS). User sends this code to complete verification. Not returned for manual OTP method.

whatsappNumber.description: WhatsApp business number for generating QR code. Only returned for WhatsApp verification method.

otp.description: Six-digit one-time password received via SMS for mobile verification

keyUri.description: otpauth:// URI for rendering a QR code on the frontend

manualSetupKey.description: Manual setup key for users who cannot scan the QR code, to be entered manually in authenticator app

issuer.description: Name of the service/application issuing the TOTP

accountName.description: Account identifier displayed in the authenticator app, typically the user email

code.description: Six-digit TOTP verification code from the authenticator app

success.description: Indicates whether the backup codes were generated successfully

message.description: Human-readable message describing the result of the operation
message.example: Backup codes generated successfully. Store them securely.

backupCodes.description: Array of one-time use backup codes for account recovery

warning.description: Important warning message about storing backup codes securely
warning.example: These codes will only be shown once. Store them in a secure location. Each code can only be used once.

options.description: WebAuthn PublicKeyCredentialCreationOptions object containing challenge, relying party info, user info, and supported algorithms for passkey registration

credential.description: WebAuthn credential registration response from the browser containing attestation data

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for the user

method.description: The multi-factor authentication method configured by the user

backupCodesRemaining.description: Number of unused backup codes remaining for account recovery

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp when multi-factor authentication was last used

createdAt.description: Timestamp when multi-factor authentication was initially configured

password.description: Password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

maskedPhone.description: Masked phone number for SMS verification

requiresOnboarding.description: Whether user must complete onboarding before accessing the dashboard

accessToken.description: JWT access token (only present when authenticated)

expiresIn.description: Token expiry in seconds (only present when authenticated)

requiresOnboarding.description: Whether the user needs to complete onboarding

device.description: Device information parsed from user agent

location.description: Geographic location based on IP address

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current session

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

otp.description: 6 digit OTP sent to the user email

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

email.description: User email address to identify which passkey credentials to allow. If not provided, all registered passkeys for discoverable credentials will be allowed

sessionId.description: Session identifier from the passkey authentication options request

credential.description: WebAuthn authentication response containing the signed challenge and credential data

sessionId.description: MFA session identifier obtained from the login challenge response

code.description: Six-digit TOTP code from the authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy)

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticating subsequent API requests

sessionId.description: MFA session identifier obtained from the login challenge response

success.description: Indicates whether the SMS OTP was sent successfully

message.description: Human-readable message about the SMS OTP status

maskedPhone.description: Masked phone number where the OTP was sent

sessionId.description: MFA session identifier obtained from the login challenge response

code.description: Six-digit verification code received via SMS

sessionId.description: MFA session identifier obtained from the login challenge response

options.description: WebAuthn authentication options to be passed to the browser credentials API (navigator.credentials.get)

clientDataJSON.description: Base64URL-encoded client data JSON containing challenge and origin

authenticatorData.description: Base64URL-encoded authenticator data containing flags and counter

signature.description: Base64URL-encoded signature over the client data and authenticator data

rawId.description: Raw credential ID in Base64URL format (same as id)

response.description: Authenticator response containing the cryptographic proof

sessionId.description: MFA session identifier obtained from the login challenge response

fullName.description: The full name of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

phone.description: The phone number of the user

phoneCountry.description: The ISO country code for the phone number

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user profile picture

locale.description: The locale/language preference of the user

timezone.description: The timezone preference of the user

accountStatus.description: The current account status of the user

emailVerified.description: Whether the user email has been verified

phoneVerified.description: Whether the user phone number has been verified

onboardingStep.description: The current step in the user onboarding process

passwordHash.description: The hashed password for direct password updates (use with caution)

mediaId.description: Media asset ID for the organization logo

role.description: Authenticated user's role in this organization

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the organization was last updated
